entries.title: ThriveStack: The AI
entries.description: The Growth Platform for the AI Era — transform Vibe projects into recurring revenue business with cross‑GTM intelligence.

entries.title: Endpoint Name
entries.description: Short description of what this endpoint does.

entries.title: GetAccountById
entries.description: Fetch a complete account profile by its unique ID. Returns acquisition, activation, monetization, engagement, and firmographic data — everything ThriveStack has learned about the account.

entries.title: GetAccountById
entries.description: Fetch a complete account profile by its unique ID. Returns acquisition, activation, monetization, engagement, and firmographic data — everything ThriveStack has learned about the account.

entries.title: GetAccountEnrichment
entries.description: Enrich a company by domain. Returns firmographic data, technology stack, industry classification, social profiles, and business metrics — sourced from third-party enrichment providers. Use this to customize onboarding flows or personalize your product based on a customer's organization attributes.

entries.title: GetAccountEnrichment
entries.description: Enrich a company by domain. Returns firmographic data, technology stack, industry classification, social profiles, and business metrics — sourced from third-party enrichment providers. Use this to customize onboarding flows or personalize your product based on a customer's organization attributes.

entries.title: GetAccounts
entries.description: Fetch a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of accounts enriched with acquisition, activation, monetization, engagement, expansion, and firmographic data — to power customer-health dashboards, segment automations, and CRM exports.

entries.title: GetAccounts
entries.description: Fetch a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of accounts enriched with acquisition, activation, monetization, engagement, expansion, and firmographic data — to power customer-health dashboards, segment automations, and CRM exports.

entries.title: GetSegments
entries.description: List the saved segments for your product and environment. Use a segment's id or systemName with the segmentId input on GetAccounts or GetUsers to apply its saved filters.

entries.title: GetSegments
entries.description: List the saved segments for your product and environment. Use a segment's id or systemName with the segmentId input on GetAccounts or GetUsers to apply its saved filters.

entries.title: GetUserById
entries.description: Fetch a complete user profile by their unique ID. Returns acquisition signals, engagement metrics, and demographic information — the full picture ThriveStack has on a single user. For a paginated, filterable list of users , use GetUsers .

entries.title: GetUserById
entries.description: Fetch a complete user profile by their unique ID. Returns acquisition signals, engagement metrics, and demographic information — the full picture ThriveStack has on a single user. For a paginated, filterable list of users , use GetUsers .

entries.title: GetUserEnrichment
entries.description: Enrich a person by email address. Returns professional title, role, seniority, company details, LinkedIn and social profiles, and location — sourced from third-party enrichment providers. Use this to implement personalized onboarding experiences based on a user's job function and seniority.

entries.title: GetUserEnrichment
entries.description: Enrich a person by email address. Returns professional title, role, seniority, company details, LinkedIn and social profiles, and location — sourced from third-party enrichment providers. Use this to implement personalized onboarding experiences based on a user's job function and seniority.

entries.title: GetUsers
entries.description: Fetch a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of users enriched with acquisition, engagement, and demographic data — to segment your user base, build cohorts, and power user-level personalization.

entries.title: GetUsers
entries.description: Fetch a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of users enriched with acquisition, engagement, and demographic data — to segment your user base, build cohorts, and power user-level personalization.

entries.title: Group
entries.description: The Group call associates a user with an account — a company, organization, workspace, or team. It lets you capture account-level traits and link user activity to account-level signals in ThriveStack.

entries.title: Group
entries.description: The Group call associates a user with an account — a company, organization, workspace, or team. It lets you capture account-level traits and link user activity to account-level signals in ThriveStack.

entries.title: Identify
entries.description: The Identify call lets you associate actions with a specific user and capture descriptive traits about them — such as their email, name, and account membership. It is the foundation of user-level analytics in ThriveStack.

entries.title: Identify
entries.description: The Identify call lets you associate actions with a specific user and capture descriptive traits about them — such as their email, name, and account membership. It is the foundation of user-level analytics in ThriveStack.

entries.title: Invoices
entries.description: The Invoices API lets you create, update, and delete billing invoices in ThriveStack. Invoices are linked to customers and can be associated with subscriptions and transactions for full revenue tracking.

entries.title: Invoices
entries.description: The Invoices API lets you create, update, and delete billing invoices in ThriveStack. Invoices are linked to customers and can be associated with subscriptions and transactions for full revenue tracking.

entries.title: Subscription Items
entries.description: The Subscription Items API lets you create, update, and delete individual line items within a subscription in ThriveStack. Subscription items represent the specific plans and prices attached to a subscription, enabling granular MRR tracking across products, tiers, and billing intervals.

entries.title: Subscription Items
entries.description: The Subscription Items API lets you create, update, and delete individual line items within a subscription in ThriveStack. Subscription items represent the specific plans and prices attached to a subscription, enabling granular MRR tracking across products, tiers, and billing intervals.

entries.title: Subscriptions
entries.description: The Subscriptions API lets you create, update, and delete recurring billing subscriptions in ThriveStack. Subscriptions drive MRR tracking, churn detection, and renewal signals across your customer base.

entries.title: Subscriptions
entries.description: The Subscriptions API lets you create, update, and delete recurring billing subscriptions in ThriveStack. Subscriptions drive MRR tracking, churn detection, and renewal signals across your customer base.

entries.title: Track
entries.description: The Track call records actions users perform in your product. It is the primary mechanism for capturing behavioral data — from lifecycle events like sign-up and account creation, to feature engagement, onboarding steps, page visits, and viral actions.

entries.title: Track
entries.description: The Track call records actions users perform in your product. It is the primary mechanism for capturing behavioral data — from lifecycle events like sign-up and account creation, to feature engagement, onboarding steps, page visits, and viral actions.

entries.title: Transactions
entries.description: The Transactions API lets you create, update, and delete payment transaction records in ThriveStack. Transactions represent individual payment events — charges or refunds — tied to customers and invoices.

entries.title: Transactions
entries.description: The Transactions API lets you create, update, and delete payment transaction records in ThriveStack. Transactions represent individual payment events — charges or refunds — tied to customers and invoices.

entries.title: HubSpot → ThriveStack
entries.description: Import companies, contacts, deals, tickets and engagement history from HubSpot. Every account in ThriveStack shows its CRM context alongside product usage.

entries.title: ThriveStack → HubSpot
entries.description: Push MRR, activation status and engagement signals from ThriveStack into HubSpot company properties — so your sales and CS teams always have live product data inside HubSpot.

entries.title: HubSpot
entries.description: Connect ThriveStack with HubSpot to unify your product usage data and CRM records in one place.

entries.description: Start here to configure customer health and success workflows.

entries.title: Setup Health Scores

entries.title: Goal Conversion
entries.description: Track how often key business goals — signups, demo requests, page visits — are achieved. Follow these steps to create a goal, wire up event tracking, and pin it to your Unified Dashboard.

entries.title: Google Ads
entries.description: Close the loop between ad spend and revenue. ThriveStack connects Google Ads click data with real signups and payments — then feeds that signal back to Google to optimize your campaigns automatically.

entries.title: Marketing Analytics
entries.description: This guide gives you the full picture of setting up Marketing Intelligence — so you can answer which channels drive signups, how leads convert, and how marketing touches correlate with product usage and revenue.

entries.title: Setup Manually
entries.description: Add one script tag to your marketing site and ThriveStack immediately starts tracking all visitors, page views, and UTM campaigns — no events to define, no further instrumentation needed.

entries.title: Setup with AI Coding Assistants
entries.description: Use an AI coding assistant to instrument your marketing site with ThriveStack in minutes — one script tag, and your site auto-tracks all visitors, page views, and UTM campaigns.

entries.title: Advanced AI Instrumentation
entries.description: Instrument your product in three focused sessions instead of one large prompt. Each session is smaller, faster, and easier to verify before moving on.

entries.title: Track API, CLI & Agent Usage
entries.description: Understand how customers engage with your API, CLI, and AI agents — not just whether they work, but how they're actually being used.

entries.title: Environments and API Keys
entries.description: You can create as many environments as you need — one per deployment stage. For correlation to work, your marketing site and product app must both use the API key from the same environment.

entries.title: Environments and API Keys
entries.description: You can create as many environments as you need — one per deployment stage. For correlation to work, your marketing site and product app must both use the API key from the same environment.
